cards.title: Practical Processes
cards.content:
• Role of TPA (Third Party Administrator)
• Cashless vs. Reimbursement Claims
• Pre (30 Days) & Post (60 Days) Hospitalization
• Network vs. Non-Network Hospitals

cards.title: 1. Cashless vs Reimbursement
cards.content:
Cashless: At Network Hospitals only. Insurer pays hospital directly.
Reimbursement: At Non-Network Hospitals. Patient pays first, then gets refund.

cards.title: 2. Role of TPA
cards.content: Licensed by IRDAI to process claims and issue ID cards. CRITICAL: Risk/Liability always rests with the Insurance Co, NOT the TPA.

cards.title: Pre & Post Expenses
cards.content:
Pre-Hospitalization: 30 DAYS before admission.
Post-Hospitalization: 60 DAYS after discharge.

cards.title: Claim Intimation
cards.content:
Emergency: Inform within 24 hours.
Planned: Inform 48-72 hours before admission.

sections.title: 🚀 Exam Pro-Tips (Repeated Themes)
items: TPA Risk: None (Financial risk is with Insurer).
